title: Venezuelan Christmas Pudding En Croute
description: A richly layered lacto-vegetarian friendly dessert featuring Christmas pudding in a crumbly pastry crust, infused with floral notes and adventurous Venezuelan flavors.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
In a small bowl, whisk together the rose water, orange blossom water, and confectioners sugar.
Spread the Christmas pudding over the center of the pastry, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Brush the edges of the pastry with the beaten egg.
Fold the pastry over the pudding, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the top of the pastry with the melted butter and sprinkle with the almond extract.
Place the pastry on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25 minutes.
Reduce the oven temperature to 350 degrees and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the pastry from the oven and let it cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes before serving.
